Started the development server in the background. It's running via `webpack serve` in development mode.

The server should be available at a local URL (typically `http://localhost:8080` or similar). Check the terminal output for the exact URL and port.

The server will continue running in the background and will automatically reload when you make code changes. To stop it, use Ctrl+C in the terminal where it's running.
